pageContext.name: Daredevil Volume 1 #1
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are excited to present the Daredevil Volume 1 #1 Pewter Collectible!  Although radioactive waste robs him of his sight in a freak accident, Matt Murdock soon realizes the same tragedy has heightened his remaining senses. Disguised by his public persona of a blind lawyer, Murdock fights crime as his alter ego Daredevil, a costumed hero possessed of remarkable skill enhanced by his extraordinary sensory abilities.  Alan Quah and Ghim Ong's exciting pewter Daredevil charges out of Jack Kirby and Bill Everett's 1964 cover art in his iconic first-appearance costume, signature billy club at the ready.  Alan Quah is a respected illustrator in the international comics and collectibles communities. Ghim Ong's strong interest in 3D sculpting has led to his working on Marvel, DC, and Disney properties.  Don't miss your chance to add this pewter collectible to your Marvel collection today!
